title: DNA Digestion with DNase I
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d8akb","text":"Protocol for DNase I digestion of nuclei for 'double hit' DNase-SEQ analysis adapted from doi:10.1038/nmeth.2762","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3va8s","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6qs7p","text":"As a general guide DNA should show moderate to light smearing after completing the protocol as seen the gel image in Figure 1.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"oaj0","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ad3rj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7b205","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"976ga","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6in24","text":"Figure 1: A representative 2% (w/v) LMP agarose gel of DNAse I treated nuclei (~2x108) from Sorghum bicolor. To each sample the following amounts of DNase I were added: none, 7.5U, 12.5U.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9},{"style":"sup","offset":84,"length":1},{"style":"italic","offset":92,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b41ua","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"gajj","text":"Over-digested samples will result in a high background signal from unspecific cutting of DNA and should be avoided. To each sample the following amounts of DNase I were added: none, 5,U 7.5U,10U, 12.5U.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9},{"style":"sup","offset":84,"length":1},{"style":"italic","offset":92,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6pb7m","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cvu03","text":"Gel fragments from ~50-600bp should be excised and DNA purified. steps: Prepare enzyme mixtures in 2 mL centrifuge tubes: %s %s Final Enzyme Concentration/U Amount of Buffer D/μL; Amount of DNAseI [1U/μL]/μL 0 0 500 2.5 2.5 497.5 7.5 7.5 492.5 12.5 12.5 487.5 Note: From experfience a range of enzyme concentrations should be used due to variability in digestion outcome. Manual inspection of the resulting digestions dictates which samples to choose for further processing.
Incubate nuclei and enzyme mixtures at 37 o C 00:01:00
Add 500 μL of nuclei to 500 μL of enzyme mix. Mix by inverting and incubate at 37 o C.
Stop the reaction by addition of 1 mL of stop buffer and incubate tubes at 55 o C. 00:15:00
Add proteinase K [20mg/mL] to each tube and incubate at 55 o C. undetermined 01:00:00
Add 1:1 (v/v) phenol:chloroform:isoamylalcohol (25:24:1) to each reaction, hand shake vigorously. spin down 14,000rpm in microcentrifuge tube. 00:15:00

Before the experiment make up stocks and store at 4 o C. Buffer A (1L) %s %s Component [Stock]/M Volume/mL [Final]/mM TRIS-HCl pH 8.0 1 15 15 NaCl 5 3 15 KCl 1 60 60 EDTA pH 8.0 0.5 2 1 dH2O up to 1L 10x Buffer D (10 mL) %s %s Component [Stock]/M Volume [Final]/mM MgCl2 1 0.6 60 NaCl 5 0.2 100 CaCl2 1 0.1 10 TRIS-HCl pH 8.0 1 4 400 dH2O up to 10 mL Stop Buffer (1L) %s %s Component [Stock] Volume/mL [Final] TRIS-HCl pH8.0 1M 50 50mM NaCl 5M 20 100mM SDS 20% (w/v) 5 0.1% (w/v) EDTA pH8.0 0.5M 200 100mM dH2O up to 1L

On the day of the experiment make the following buffers: Buffer A+ %s %s Component [Stock] Volume/μL Spermine 0.1M 30 Spermidine 0.1M 100 DTT 1M 10 PIC* 100x 200 NP-40 40 Buffer A 20 *PIC=Protease inhibitor cocktail (1 tablet of Roche EDTA-free complete protease inhibitor is resuspended in 500 μl) 1x Buffer D %s %s Component Volume/mL 10x Buffer D 1.5 Buffer A+ 13.5 Stop Buffer Stock %s %s Component [Stock] Volume Spermine 0.1M 30 Spermidine 0.1M 100 RNAse A 10mg/mL 20 Stop Buffer Stock Up to 10mL

Spin down nuclei at 1500g for 10 mins. Wash once with buffer A and re-suspend in 1x Buffer D to a concentration of ~4x10 8 nuclei/mL Note: The amount of nuclei required for each reaction may well vary between species, a concentration of ~4 x 10^8 worked well for Sorghum bicolor, Setaria italica, Zea mays and Brachypodium distachyon.
Spin down 14,000 rpm in a microcentrifuge 00:15:00
Dispose of ethanol solution and wash pellet in 1 mL 70% ethanol (v/v). Invert tube 3-5 times and spin down 14,000 rpm in microcentrifuge.
Perform gel extraction using QIAGEN QIAquick gel extraction kit, quantify the amount of DNA using a Qubit prior to library construction.
creator: Steven J Burgess
